UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, CROSS DEFENDANT ALENE YOUNG'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. FACTS PRESENTED IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT DEMONSTRATE ALLEGATIONS FOR THE WASTE AND NEGLIGENT TRESPASS CAUSES OF ACTION. CROSS-DEFENDANT ALENE YOUNG SHALL FILE AN ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT WITHIN 20 DAYS FROM THE ENTRY OF THE ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sarah Brann, CSR No. 3887, Bus. Tel: 415-357-4300. (D501)

Appearances:
Patrick Hill, Esq. of Legal Assistance to the Elderly (415-538-3333), counsel for plaintiff/cross-defendant/moving party
Karen Uchiyama, Esq. (415-563-9300), counsel for defendant/cross-complainant/opposing party

Court hears arguments from both sides. Court rules now as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALENE YOUNG's Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions is GRANTED, responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production without objections must be provided to Plaintiff within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $375. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-04-2014 Continued To Nov-18-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF ALENE YOUNG's Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions is CONTINUED to November 18, 2014, on the Court's own motion. Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-15-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-13-2014 Reset From Aug-13-14 To Aug-27-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Drohan, Esq. of LAE, (415-538-3333), for Alene Young, Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant and moving party.
Karen Y. Uchiyama, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-563-9301), for Nancy Williams, Defendant/Cross-Complainant and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT ALENE YOUNG's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Facts presented in the cross-complaint demonstrate allegations for the Waste and Negligent Trespass causes of action. Cross-Defendant Alene Young shall file an answer to Cross Complaint within 20 days from the entry of the Order. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
